en: Does your company perform work activities at facilities regulated by the Process Safety Management Standards? Fed OSHA PSM Regulation Explanation
Does your company train employees in the work practices necessary to perform their jobs safely?
Does your company have documentation that shows employees have received and understood the training provided?
Describe how your company verifies that its employees are instructed in the known potential fire, explosion, or toxic release hazards and the applicable provisions of the emergency action plan.
Describe how your company informs the host facility of any unique hazards associated with the company's work activities.
